title: oraclium
description: Discover Oraclium our minecraft mod which adds new ores, ingots, armor and tools and new items and an improved crafting table which allows you to create hammers oraclium is a "BetterVanillia"
body:
# 🔮 Oraclium — The Vanilla+ Extension That Enhances Minecraft
**⭐ Thank you to everyone who supports the project!**
🔔 To discover more content and follow the CobbleStudio universe, visit [cobblestudio](https://cobblestudio).![CobbleStudio Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ccd79705914ce6420c958b280493697065db4c9.png)
## 🧱 Overview
Oraclium is a vanilla-like mod designed to enrich Minecraft without altering its core identity.
The goal: to offer a deeper, more varied, and more immersive experience, while remaining true to the style and balance of the original game.
No futuristic machines, no overpowered abilities — Oraclium integrates seamlessly into a survival game, as if Mojang had released a major update focused on exploration, materials, and progression.
If you'd like to share ideas, concepts, or feedback, join the community on Discord.

## 💎 Key Features
- New Ores — Azurite, Auralite, Ruby, Malachite, and more
- Unique Armor & Tools — Each material has its own distinct identity
- New Biomes — Brand-new environments in the Overworld and the End
- Generated Structures — Ruins, shrines, and mysterious areas to explore
- Improved Explosives — More powerful and fun TNT variants
- Underground Additions — New blocks to diversify caves
- New Enchantments — More progression options
- Compatibility: JEI / Jade — Perfect for modpacks and new players
  
And this is just a glimpse: Oraclium continues to expand with each update.

## 🌍 Why Choose Oraclium?
Minecraft can become repetitive once everything has been explored.
Oraclium breathes new life into the game by adding:
1. variety,
2. progression,
3. discovery,
4. and a richer atmosphere,
all while remaining perfectly consistent with the game's universe.
The mod integrates seamlessly into modpacks, thanks to its balanced approach and natural compatibility.
